dependencyReview.reason: Private repository dependency-review APIs may be unavailable locally, so CI preserves SBOM artifacts and npm audit output while policy checks enforce the same review inputs.

dependencyGraphNote: When org-level dependency review APIs are enabled, wire actions/dependency-review-action with fail-on-severity=high; until then, this policy requires lockfile, SBOM, license, install-script, and lifecycle checks plus uploaded SBOM artifacts.
